name: Fincra
description: African cross-border payment infrastructure API supporting virtual accounts in NGN/GBP/EUR and 150+ country coverage.

seo.title: Fincra — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Fincra: African cross-border payment infrastructure API supporting virtual accounts in NGN/GBP/EUR and 150+ country coverage.

when_to_use: Virtual NGN/GBP/EUR accounts for African cross-border collection
Cross-border payouts to 150+ countries from African business accounts
Embedding African payment collection and disbursement in fintech products
Building global money movement products with African virtual account infrastructure

pros: Virtual accounts in NGN, GBP, EUR
review.verdict: Practical cross-border option for African businesses paying out globally — younger but developer-friendly.
review.best_for: African businesses needing virtual accounts and global payouts
review.not_for: Large enterprises requiring the most established compliance track record

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
